screens.title: Ultra high-resolution close-up of the smartphone screen from {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_16}}. The screen must display the 'Sillón Lounge Serenidad' product page with extreme clarity. The product image (a cream-colored armchair with light wood frame), the title 'Sillón Lounge Serenidad' in bold serif typography, and the price '$899.00' must be perfectly sharp and legible. The text should be clean and professional. Maintain the man's hands holding the phone, the soft home office background, and the warm lighting. High fidelity, professional commercial photography style.

screens.name: projects/14760269208940461002/screens/402faff489f54cb4bb65c80a355b7dd3
screens.title: Minimalist and calm lifestyle photography for an ecommerce brand named Aura. A high-quality brown leather backpack and a ceramic vase on a clean wooden table with soft morning light. The aesthetic is warm, organized, and premium, using a palette of soft pinks, creams, and deep purples. High fidelity, professional photography.
